name: Faye Adams
abstract: Faye Adams (born Fanny Tuell, May 22, 1923 – November 2, 2016), who also performed under the stage names Faye Scruggs and Fannie Jones and Atomic Adams, was an American singer who recorded and performed gospel and rhythm and blues. She had several chart hits in the early 1950s, in the Billboard rhythm and blues record chart chart and con…

about_quotes.speaker: Tommy Ridgley
about_quotes.evidence: She was working the show with us... she admired me, and I admired her for her abilities.
